value MinMax
  min: Int
  max: Int
end

fn min_max(_ xs: List<Int>) -> MinMax
  mut lo = xs.get(0).ok_or("empty").unwrap_or_else_unused()
  mut hi = lo
  mut i = 1
  while i < xs.len()
    let v = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if v < lo
      lo = v
    end
    if v > hi
      hi = v
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  MinMax(min: lo, max: hi)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let xs = [5, 1, 9, 3, 7, 2]
  let r = min_max(xs)
  println("min=#{r.min}")
  println("max=#{r.max}")
end
